title: CDATA
text: CDATA Inserts a <![CDATA[ prefix and adds the unparsed content, as-is, to the XML document. UXMLWRITER.CDATA Parameters None. Return Values Values returned: 0 Success. –1 Failure. Called in an illegal sequence. Description The CDATA element can only follow a call to a START_ELEMENT or CHARACTERS . The closing suffix ]]> is added when CHARACTERS , START_ELEMENT , END_ELEMENT , or END_DOCUMENT is called. This makes it possible to have multiple CDATA sections within one element, if needed, or a single one created by calling CDATA multiple times in succession. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
